package rulefixtures

// scenario for likely_n_squared_string_concat: Opt-in deeper semantic signal for repeated string concatenation inside nested loops without obvious builder usage.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule613NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario613Negative(records []Rule613NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
